questions.question: Who did Paul send to the Thessalonians to strengthen their faith?
questions.feedback: Paul sent Timothy, his brother and co-worker, to strengthen and encourage them.

questions.question: What news did Timothy bring back to Paul about the Thessalonians?
options: Good news of their faith and love
A request for Paul to return
questions.correct: Good news of their faith and love
questions.feedback: Timothy brought the good news of their faith and love back to Paul.

questions.question: Paul said that Christians are destined to experience afflictions.
questions.feedback: Paul warned that believers are appointed to endure afflictions.

questions.question: Paul said he was afraid that the _____ had tempted the Thessalonians and his labor would be in vain.
questions.feedback: Paul feared that the tempter had tempted them and their work would be useless.

questions.question: Paul prayed night and day to see them face to face and to complete what was _____ in their faith.
questions.feedback: Paul prayed earnestly to supply what was lacking in their faith.
